heroSubtext: Explore insights, stories, and tools to help you cultivate clarity, confidence, and purpose
featuredBlogExcerpt: This is where your featured blog post excerpt will appear. Share your insights on clarity, mindset, and personal transformation to help your readers on their inner journey.

blogPosts.title: Finding Clarity in Uncertain Times
blogPosts.excerpt: Discover practical strategies to navigate life's uncertainties and reconnect with your inner wisdom.

blogPosts.title: The Power of Self-Compassion
blogPosts.excerpt: Learn how treating yourself with kindness can transform your inner dialogue and boost confidence.

blogPosts.title: Your Journey Starts Within
blogPosts.excerpt: Explore why the most transformative journey you'll ever take begins with looking inward.

podcasts.title: Introduction to Your Inner Journey
podcasts.excerpt: Join me as we explore what it means to embark on an inner journey, and why it's the foundation for lasting transformation in your life.

podcasts.title: Breaking Through Limiting Beliefs
podcasts.excerpt: Discover how to identify and overcome the limiting beliefs that keep you stuck, and replace them with empowering narratives.

podcasts.title: Cultivating Daily Clarity Practices
podcasts.excerpt: Learn simple yet powerful daily practices that help you maintain clarity, focus, and alignment with your values.
